# Clarity Extract

## Description

Draw 1 card. At the start of your next 3 turns, draw 1 additional card.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Strong setup potion for elite/boss fights where early hand quality matters; use before key turns to find attacks, block, or powers across multiple turns.
